name: Railer
description: Railer sniper rifles fire at a much higher rate than most, using 2 sniper rounds per trigger pull. Shots ricochet off surfaces and pass through targets. They hit harder than same-level snipers but suffer a strong reduction to critical hit damage, so builds relying on big crit bonuses get less value. This makes them weak on Zer0, but more workable on non-traditional snipers like Axton. Manufacturer traits: Maliwan boosts status chance and adds a small splash on impact. Dahl fires in burst while scoped.
notes: Dropped at random from appropriate loot sources. Zer0s B0re will not trigger because the Railer already pierces, preventing B0re from applying. Gaiges Close Enough can activate after a shot passes through a target; it cannot hit the first enemy again, but can bounce to and damage other enemies as normal.
